name: nowsdk-pm
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the nowsdk-pm plugin — a ServiceNow PM doc-generator and offline Now SDK bootstrap.

plugins.name: nowsdk-pm
plugins.description: ServiceNow PM: generate a full, whole-platform design document (AFU v1) from a plain-language app description — recommending best-fit components and their delivery channel (Fluent offline / Now SDK with auth / on-platform) — and optionally bootstrap an offline no-auth Now SDK update-set workspace.
